bugs_found: Race condition: bucket lookup outside lock in allow() — concurrent threads could exceed rate limit or create duplicate entries
time.time() instead of time.monotonic() — clock can jump backward during NTP sync, breaking window calculations
Bare except: in reset() — catches KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit, masking fatal errors
Off-by-one: first request always allowed even when max_requests=0 — bucket initialized with count=1 and returned True without checking limit
Unused import: field from dataclasses never used
